summary: Frontend-only testing of the 5th redesigned landing page - NO CARDS design with lighter backgrounds. All 25 UI tests passed (100%). Features now use full-width inline strips with dividers, how-it-works uses vertical timeline, demo uses bare floating messages, scenarios use floating pill tags with parallax.
passed_tests: Navbar visible with data-testid='navbar'
Logo button (data-testid='logo-button') visible
Nav Start Free button (data-testid='nav-start-btn') navigates to /chat -> /auth
Nav links present: Features, How it works, Scenarios (hidden on mobile, visible md+)
Hero section (data-testid='hero-section') displays with heading 'Learn any language by speaking it'
Hero subtitle displays '50+ languages' highlighted in emerald green
Hero AI Language Tutor badge displayed
Hero Start button (data-testid='hero-start-btn') navigates to /chat -> /auth
Hero Dashboard button (data-testid='hero-dashboard-btn') navigates to /dashboard -> /auth
Hero greeting ticker shows animated greetings (Bonjour, Hola, Ciao, etc.)
Features section (data-testid='features-section') displays with id='features'
Features section has 4 inline strips with dividers (NO CARDS): Voice-First, Karaoke Tracking, Live AI Tools, Adaptive Curriculum
Features section background color: #0c1a2e
How it works section (data-testid='tools-section') has id='how-it-works'
How it works section shows 4 vertical timeline steps with connecting line
Timeline steps: Speak naturally, AI analyzes in real-time, Get spoken feedback, Level up automatically
Timeline has 4 STEP 01-04 labels and 4 icon dots
How it works section background color: #111827
Demo section (data-testid='demo-section') displays bare floating chat messages
Demo Try it yourself button (data-testid='demo-try-btn') navigates to /chat -> /auth
Demo section background color: #1a1033
Scenarios section (data-testid='scenarios-section') has id='scenarios'
Scenarios section shows 5 floating pill tags with parallax: Job Interview, Travel, Restaurant, Small Talk, Business
Scenarios section background color: #14181f
CTA section (data-testid='cta-section') displays 'Stop studying. Start speaking.' heading
CTA Begin lesson button (data-testid='cta-start-btn') navigates to /chat -> /auth
CTA section background color: #0f172a
Footer (data-testid='footer') shows logo, Practice/Dashboard/Vocabulary links
Footer Practice link navigates to /chat -> /auth
Footer Dashboard link navigates to /dashboard -> /auth
Footer Vocabulary link navigates to /vocabulary -> /auth
Scroll progress bar appears at top (gradient: indigo -> emerald -> pink)
Anchor link #features scrolls to features section
Anchor link #how-it-works scrolls to how it works section
Anchor link #scenarios scrolls to scenarios section
Mobile responsive (390px): Navbar condenses to logo + Start Free only
Tablet responsive (768px): Nav links visible, layout adapts properly
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page successfully redesigned - NO CARDS anywhere as requested
Features section now uses FeatureStrip components with inline full-width design and subtle dividers
How it works section now uses TimelineStep components with vertical timeline and connecting line
Demo section uses bare floating DemoChat messages without card wrapper
Scenarios section uses ScenarioTag floating pill components with parallax scroll effect
Lighter section backgrounds correctly configured: hero=#0f172a, features=#0c1a2e, tools=#111827, demo=#1a1033, scenarios=#14181f, cta=#0f172a, footer=#080c14
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Framer Motion animations working: word reveals, scroll progress, parallax, inView triggers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page 5th redesign completed with NO CARDS design. All data-testids work: navbar, logo-button, nav-start-btn, hero-section, hero-start-btn, hero-dashboard-btn, features-section, tools-section, demo-section, demo-try-btn, scenarios-section, cta-section, cta-start-btn, footer. Features now use inline strips with dividers. How-it-works uses vertical timeline. Demo uses floating messages. Scenarios use floating pill tags. All navigation buttons redirect to /auth for unauthenticated users. Anchor navigation (#features, #how-it-works, #scenarios) works correctly. Demo account: demo@mumble.app / demo123. Mobile and tablet responsive.

design_verification.features_design: Full-width inline strips with subtle dividers between each feature
design_verification.how_it_works_design: Vertical timeline with connecting line and icon dots
design_verification.demo_design: Bare floating chat messages without card wrapper
design_verification.scenarios_design: Floating pill tags with parallax scroll effect
